sections.title: 核心內容
sections.content:
For Sale Maurice Needs a Home
My Shiba had 3 puppies last month. I’m moving to a new place and
They may become medium-sized. cannot take my cat with me. Maurice
Shibas are happy dogs and like is quiet and needs only a corner in your
running and playing in large places. room. It will be wonderful to have him
You’ ll have fun with them. in your family.
Call Ms. Kuo 2121-5555 Call 8888-5757 Joyce
( ) 16. What can we learn about Shibas?
(A) They are big and tall dogs.
(B) They are slow and shy dogs.
(C) They need lots of space to move around.
(D) Their hair color becomes black with age.
( )17 What do we know from the four notices?
(A) Maurice is a small dog.
(B) Vivi is in the hospital now.
(©) Mr. Chang is looking for his dog.
(D) Dr. Wu is giving away his black dog.
summary_points: For Sale Maurice Needs a Home
My Shiba had 3 puppies last month. I’m moving to a new place and
They may become medium-sized. cannot take my cat with me. Maurice
